AttachmentDAOImpl is the Data Access Object implementation for the Attachment entity.

AttachmentDAOInt is the Data Access Object interface for the Attachment entity.
AttachmentDTO - Class in com.rays.dto
AttachmentDTO is the Data Transfer Object class for managing file attachments.

Default constructor.

AttachmentServiceImpl is the service implementation class for the Attachment entity.

AttachmentServiceInt is the service interface for the Attachment entity.
